subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of this wanderer! The Lord of Hosts beareth witness that in heart and soul not for a moment am I forgetful of your remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران این آواره حضرت یزدان شاهد و گواهست که در دل و جان آنی فراغت از یاد
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @material and spiritual existence; two books
